name: Asset Browser
description: Primary discovery surface for a fractional ownership platform. Investors browse tokenized assets, filter by class and yield, and drill into detailed valuation, cap table, and dividend history.

page_briefs.browse: Public-facing asset discovery grid. Persistent search-filter bar across the top with facets for asset class, yield range, minimum investment, and geography. Responsive product card grid below shows each asset with hero image, token price, current yield, funding progress, and quick-invest button.
page_briefs.asset-detail: Deep asset profile page. Detail header anchors with asset name, ticker, price, and primary CTA. Area valuation chart visualizes price history with selectable time ranges. Summary cap table shows top holders and float. Standard dividend ledger lists recent distributions with amounts and payout dates.

shells.top-nav-main: Top navigation with main content area for public browsing
